title: can you look at like the last 2 months of raid, look at flex players (players who play more than 1 class). can you run an analysis on who from our guild are the strongest flex players?

turns.userText: can you look at like the last 2 months of raid, look at flex players (players who play more than 1 class). can you run an analysis on who from our guild are the strongest flex players?
turns.agentText:
Let me pull the last 2 months of data — runs list, attendance, and player stats all at once.

Good data — 31 runs from April 17 – June 15, no skipped runs. Let me now render the flex analysis chart before writing up the full breakdown.

{{figure}}

---

## Flex Player Analysis — Apr 17 – Jun 15 (31 runs)

Flex = 3+ distinct specs, 10+ runs to ensure enough data. "Strongest" weighs **role breadth** (DPS ↔ Support crossover), **raw performance** (cleanses, strips, healing, damage), and **volume**. Here's the tiered breakdown:

---

### 🏆 Tier 1 — Elite Flex

These players don't just play multiple specs; they perform strongly **across both sides of the DPS/Support divide**.

| Player | Specs (count) | Runs | Cleanses | Strips | Healing | Damage |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **FatherHyperion.1047** | Druid, Tempest, Reaper, Berserker, Firebrand (5) | 27 | 17,028 | 16,533 | 14.75M | 117M |
| **Wisdom.6028** | Reaper, Firebrand, Scourge, Troubadour, Paragon, Berserker (6) | 30 | 4,251 | **19,747** | 5.67M | 127M |
| **Mes.1906** | Reaper, Harbinger, Tempest, Firebrand, Amalgam, Paragon, Berserker, Troubadour, Scourge, Necromancer, Druid (11) | 22 | 18,724 | 5,001 | 35.2M | 97M |

**FatherHyperion** is the standout: 5 specs covering every WvW role bucket — burst healer (Druid), power DPS (Reaper/Berserker), boon support (Firebrand/Tempest) — and 17K cleanses + 16.5K strips is elite output. Genuinely strong *in* each role, not just present.

**Wisdom** is the guild's top boon-ripper among flex players (19.7K strips — second only to General Moo overall) while covering the full DPS-to-support arc. 30 runs of consistency seals it.

**Mes** is the "true chameleon" — 11 specs in 22 runs (nearly a different class every other raid). Their healer+cleanse numbers (18.7K cleanses, 35M healing) are top-5 guild-wide, proving the breadth isn't just padding.

---

### 🥈 Tier 2 — Strong Flex

High variety and solid numbers, but slightly narrower role range or lower volume.

| Player | Specs (count) | Runs | Stand-out stat |
|---|---|---|---|
| **WindNature.8496** | Troubadour, Virtuoso, Chronomancer, Reaper, Scourge (5) | 29 | 15.6K cleanses + 15.2K strips — elite boon-rip support |
| **harasho.4281** | Tempest, Troubadour, Amalgam, Berserker, Chronomancer (5) | **31** | Most raids attended; DPS + support flex |
| **Fibbs.1623** | 10 specs across DPS + support | 19 | 11.4K cleanses, 5.1K strips, 31M healing |
| **Jax Blake.7250** | 8 specs (Reaper, Harbinger, Druid, Vindicator, Evoker, Scourge, Virtuoso, Untamed) | 18 | 15.5K strips — elite boon-rip |

---

### 🥉 Tier 3 — Broad Breadth

Exceptional spec count but either fewer runs or lower per-spec output. Great squad flexibility assets.

| Player | Specs (count) | Runs | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **pinguinox.9528** | 12 specs | 21 | Guild-high spec count; 19.9K cleanses |
| **Tysun.5092** | 12 specs | 15 | Tied for most specs; 9.5K cleanses, 20M healing |
| **shibby.8670** | 8 specs | 18 | 16.3K cleanses; solid support flex |
| **AMINE.5278** | 9 specs | 18 | 15.2K cleanses, 10K strips; wide class diversity |
| **Izathel.4058** | 6 specs | 21 | 9.4K strips; DPS ↔ healer bridge (Druid + Amalgam + Scourge) |

---

### Summary

Your **top 3 flex assets** right now are **FatherHyperion**, **Wisdom**, and **Mes** — they combine genuine breadth with numbers that prove they're effective *in* those roles, not just logging in on a new class. If you ever need a specific role filled on short notice, those three are your most reliable calls. **WindNature** and **harasho** are close behind on volume and consistency.
